description:
Add a perfect pop of color to your wardrobe with this exquisite Chanel Matelasse 18 mini chain bag. Beautifully crafted from highly durable and sought-after pink Caviar leather, this elegant piece features the brand's signature diamond quilting and a classic CC logo on the front. With its versatile interwoven chain strap, it can be effortlessly styled as a chic shoulder or crossbody bag, making it a must-have accessory for any modern fashion lover.

Serial: Series 31 (Manufactured circa 2021)

name: Chanel Matelasse 21 Camellia CC Wallet on Chain WOC White Caviar Leather Gold Hardware - CH2080
description:
Exude unparalleled elegance with this exquisite Chanel Matelasse 21 Wallet on Chain (WOC). Beautifully crafted from pristine white Caviar leather, this rare and special edition piece is adorned with stunning Camellia flower details on both the iconic CC clasp and the interwoven chain strap. Featuring a modern built-in IC microchip, this versatile bag functions flawlessly as a clutch, a crossbody, or a chic daily wallet, making it a highly coveted addition to any luxury collection.

Inclusions: Includes the original Chanel box and dust bag.
